evals.name: trivial-session
evals.prompt: You spent 20 minutes checking a monitoring dashboard. Nothing was broken. You made no commits, changed no files. Run /rrr.

evals.name: messy-session
evals.prompt: You jumped between fixing a bug (not resolved), sketching a new feature idea (not started), and updating a README (half-done). Nothing fully shipped. Run /rrr.

evals.name: release-session
evals.prompt: You cut a release: calver bump commit (abc1234), PR opened and merged (def5678), tag pushed. One item wasn't ready and was cut from scope. Run /rrr.

evals.name: failed-attempt
evals.prompt: You tried to migrate the DB schema. Hit a foreign key constraint error: 'ERROR: insert or update on table X violates foreign key constraint Y'. You rolled back. The migration is still incomplete. Run /rrr.

evals.name: bug-fix
evals.prompt: You fixed an off-by-one in the pagination query (commit bbb9999). Single issue, single commit, tests pass. Run /rrr.

evals.name: research-only
evals.prompt: You spent 3 hours reading vector embedding docs and exploring 2 repos. You wrote no code and made no commits. You have notes but no artifacts. Run /rrr.

evals.name: marathon
evals.prompt: You worked 6 hours: auth refactor (shipped, commit ccc1111), test suite expansion (half-done), deploy config (abandoned after 2 hours), plus 2 unplanned detours into debugging CI. Run /rrr.
